items.title: 3 Papers Every School BCBA Should Read This Month
items.body:
Subject: 3 Papers Every School BCBA Should Read This Month

Quick digest with practical takeaways district teams can use this week.

items.title: Why I built BehaviorSchool Pro after 25 years in schools
items.body: Personal story post focused on reducing paperwork and restoring direct service time.

items.title: Failed the BCBA Exam? What to Do Next
items.body: Long-form post with practical next steps and a study reset plan.

items.title: Thread: 3 mistakes districts make when rolling out behavior software
items.body: Tweet thread draft with examples from implementation failures and fixes.

items.title: Is BIP Quality a Concern in Your District?
items.body: Problem/solution email for BCBA leads and SPED directors.

items.title: What I learned building AI tools for school behavior teams
items.body: Thought leadership post with one practical implementation takeaway.

items.title: BDS Modules Alternative: Why BCBAs Are Switching
Single-post: A better way to audit behavior plans at district scale
items.body: Punchy post with one clear CTA to the product walkthrough.

items.title: From Burnout to Breakthrough (Webinar Invite)
items.body: Webinar invitation with outcomes framed around workflow quality.

items.title: 3 questions every SPED director should ask before buying behavior tools
items.body: Advisor-style post designed for comments and saves.

items.title: Poll: biggest bottleneck for school BCBAs right now
items.body: Poll post draft with four options and follow-up reply plan.

items.title: Case Study: Improving BIP Quality in One District
items.body: Case study email draft pending factual review.

items.title: PassBehavior Alternative: Modern BCBA Exam Prep
items.body: Published comparison article with updated internal links.

items.title: Thread: what admin needs to see to approve behavior tech budgets
items.body: 5-part thread draft with data points and CTA to demo.

items.title: Last Call: Secure Implementation for Fall 2026
items.body: Late-cycle urgency email for procurement window.

items.title: We launched a free IEP Goal Generator. Why it is free.
items.body: Launch post with a soft CTA to BehaviorSchool tools.

items.body: Short launch post with direct link and quote tweet plan.
